title: stenandrium igneum
intro: Stenandrium igneum, also known as firecracker plant, is a plant species found in tropical forests in Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Brazil, for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stenandrium igneum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
